texto: When you look at the world in a narrow way how narrow it seems! When you look at it in a mean way how mean it is! When you look at it selfishly how selfish it is! But when you look at it in a broad generous friendly spirit what wonderful people you find in it.
explicacao: Citação de Horace Rutledge sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “When you look at the world in a narrow way how narrow it seems! When you look at it in a mean way…” articula reflexao, positive, narrow em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e viagem.
